query: multiple exposure layered scenes blended frames analog film
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: multiple exposure layered scenes

response.objective_caption: A hand holds a strip of film negatives against a dark background. Three illuminated frames on the strip show small, colorful scenes: the middle frame depicts a figure in warm orange and yellow tones, while the other two frames contain dimmer, harder-to-discern imagery. A small circular light source appears in the black background to the right of the film strip.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A hand holds a strip of film negatives in extreme darkness, with most of the frame swallowed by crushed black shadows. Three backlit frames glow with oversaturated warmth, but the images within them are mushy and indistinct, lacking clear texture or detail. The composition is tilted and awkward, cropping off portions of the hand and film strip at the edges, while a pale circular blur floats disconnected in the void of the background, suggesting an unfinished or casually captured moment with oppressive, minimal lighting.
